pageContext.name: Pebbles and Bamm-Bamm (Wedding Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Soap Studio present the Pebbles and Bamm-Bamm (Wedding Version) Statue.  The Flintstones is an American animated TV series that takes place in a parallel modern-day and Stone Age world setting. It was produced by Hanna-Barbera and first aired from 1960 to 1966.  This statue features the adorable Pebbles Flinstone, daughter of Fred and Wilma Flinstone, and the mighty Bamm-Bamm, adopted son of Barney and Betty Rubble, both themed in wedding attire.  Whether you are a fan of The Flinstones or classic cartoon collectibles, be sure to add this to your collection today!
